title: Local weather MCP server with credential-shaped env keys is REVIEW

origin.description: Public example claude_desktop_config from glaucia86/weather-mcp-server (claude_desktop_config.json.text), harvested as RC-B07 during the 0.3.0-rc.0 feedback window. The env values are upstream's own placeholders (Portuguese 'sua-...-aqui' = 'your-...-here'); DATABASE_URL/REDIS_URL point at localhost. The user-specific install path was normalized to C:/Users/example.

humanExpectation.rationale: A credential-shaped env key (WEATHER_API_KEY) is a real secret surface a reviewer must confirm is sourced safely, even though the committed value is a placeholder. The local node entrypoint and localhost DB/Redis URLs are not themselves blocking. The honest verdict is REVIEW, not BLOCK.
knownLimitations: The secrets detector keys on the credential-shaped name (*_API_KEY), not on whether the value is a live secret or a placeholder.
DATABASE_URL embeds inline credentials (mcp_user:mcp_pass) but is a localhost dev string; it is not flagged as a credential env key by name shape.
